---
title: "Welcome"
description: "First post — a short note on what this site is for."
date: "2026-05-28"
categories: [meta]
---

Welcome to my corner of the internet.

This site is where I'll be collecting notes on Python, training material,
and the occasional writeup on things I'm working on. The
[Trainings page](../../../trainings.qmd) has the running archive of sessions
I've delivered going back to 2017; everything else here is new.

More to come.
